---
title: "Proof-of-concept DKD cohort"
author: "Kanako Terakawa"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 3
    code_folding: show
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

# 1. Libraries

```{r libraries}
library(Seurat)
library(SeuratObject)
library(SeuratDisk)
library(BPCells)
library(hdf5r)
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
library(GWmodel)
library(spdep)
library(edgeR)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
library(RColorBrewer)
set.seed(42)
```

# 2. Paths

```{r paths}
h5ad_file <- "/path/to/KPMP_DKD_ST_project/SIREN_project/KPMP_ref.h5ad"
bp_dir    <- "/path/to/KPMP_DKD_ST_project/SIREN_project/KPMP_ref_bpcells_data"

# output directory
DIR_OUT <- "/path/to/KPMP_DKD_ST_project/analysis for paper/Susztak/"
dir.create(DIR_OUT, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
```

# 3. Fixed Parameters (from Discovery Analysis)

```{r fixed_params}
FINAL_FIB_GENES_DISCOVERY <- c(
  "ITGBL1", "INHBA", "NALCN", "LMOD1", "GLI2", "COL6A3", "ANO3",
  "CARMN", "PRRX1", "PDLIM3", "ANO1", "THBS2", "SULF1", "DPYSL3",
  "COL16A1", "COL5A1", "COL1A1", "NKD1", "ITGA11", "TRPC4", "EDNRA",
  "GUCY1A2", "MYH11", "CDH11", "NTM", "RAMP1", "PRR16", "PTGIS", "SYNPO2"
)

MAC_M2_SCORE_COL <- "prediction.score.MAC.M2"
GWR_FORMULA_STR  <- "Y_Fibrosis ~ X_M2 + Cov_logUMI"
f_main           <- as.formula(GWR_FORMULA_STR)

GWR_COEF_THRESHOLD       <- 0
GWR_FDR_THRESHOLD        <- 0.05
MIN_HIGHCOUPLING_SPOTS   <- 20
MIN_REFERENCE_SPOTS      <- 20

QC_MEDIAN_NFEATURE_MIN <- 500
QC_MEDIAN_MITO_MAX     <- 25
QC_MIN_SPOTS           <- 100
QC_SPOT_NFEATURE_MIN   <- 500
QC_SPOT_MITO_MAX       <- 25

cat("=== Fixed Parameters ===\n")
cat("Fibrosis genes (n =", length(FINAL_FIB_GENES_DISCOVERY), ")\n")
cat("GWR formula   :", GWR_FORMULA_STR, "\n")
cat("QC nFeature   : >=", QC_MEDIAN_NFEATURE_MIN, "\n")
```

# 4. Data Loading — DKD Only

```{r load_susztak}
message("Loading Susztak Lab Seurat object...")
susz <- readRDS("/path/to/KPMP_DKD_ST_project/HK.ST.NG.rds")
message("Loaded: ", ncol(susz), " spots × ", nrow(susz), " genes")

# DKD cases only
disease_samples <- c(
  "HK2529_ST", "HK2844_ST", "HK2873_ST",
  "HK2877_ST", "HK3035_ST", "HK3437_ST"
)

cat("\nDKD-only analysis (n =", length(disease_samples), "samples)\n")
cat("Samples:", paste(disease_samples, collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("\n=== Sample × Status (full object) ===\n")
print(table(susz$orig.ident, susz$Status))
```

# 5. QC & Filtering

```{r qc}
susz[["percent.mt"]] <- PercentageFeatureSet(susz, pattern = "^MT-")

sample_qc_stats <- susz@meta.data %>%
  filter(orig.ident %in% disease_samples) %>%
  group_by(orig.ident) %>%
  summarise(
    Median_nFeature = median(nFeature_Spatial),
    Median_Mito     = median(percent.mt),
    n_Spots         = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

cat("=== Sample QC Stats (DKD only) ===\n")
print(sample_qc_stats)

keep_samples <- sample_qc_stats %>%
  filter(
    Median_nFeature >= QC_MEDIAN_NFEATURE_MIN,
    Median_Mito     <= QC_MEDIAN_MITO_MAX,
    n_Spots         >= QC_MIN_SPOTS
  ) %>%
  pull(orig.ident)

cat("\nKeeping samples:", length(keep_samples), "/", length(disease_samples), "\n")
print(keep_samples)

keep_barcodes <- colnames(susz)[
  susz$orig.ident %in% keep_samples &
  susz$nFeature_Spatial > QC_SPOT_NFEATURE_MIN &
  susz$percent.mt       < QC_SPOT_MITO_MAX
]
cat("Spots after QC:", length(keep_barcodes), "\n")
```

# 6. Normalization & PCA

```{r preprocess}
DefaultAssay(susz) <- "Spatial"

susz <- NormalizeData(susz,
                      normalization.method = "LogNormalize",
                      scale.factor = 10000,
                      assay = "Spatial")
susz <- FindVariableFeatures(susz,
                              selection.method = "vst",
                              nfeatures = 2000,
                              assay = "Spatial")
susz <- ScaleData(susz)
susz <- RunPCA(susz,
               assay = "Spatial",
               verbose = FALSE,
               reduction.name = "pca_spatial")

# Standardize sample names
new_idents      <- make.names(susz$orig.ident)
susz$orig.ident <- new_idents
keep_samples    <- make.names(keep_samples)
disease_samples <- make.names(disease_samples)

cat("Sample names after make.names:\n")
print(keep_samples)
```

# 7. KPMP Reference Loading

```{r load_kpmp_ref}
if (!dir.exists(bp_dir)) {
  message("Converting h5ad to BPCells format...")
  raw_counts <- open_matrix_anndata_hdf5(h5ad_file)
  write_matrix_dir(mat = raw_counts, dir = bp_dir)
}

bp_counts  <- open_matrix_dir(dir = bp_dir)
ref_seurat <- CreateSeuratObject(counts = bp_counts)
cat("Reference loaded:", ncol(ref_seurat), "cells\n")

read_obs <- function(h5_path) {
  file    <- H5File$new(h5_path, mode = "r")
  on.exit(file$close_all())
  obs_grp  <- file[["obs"]]
  meta_list <- list()
  for (col in names(obs_grp)) {
    if (!grepl("^_", col)) {
      tryCatch({
        item <- obs_grp[[col]]
        if ("categories" %in% names(item)) {
          meta_list[[col]] <- item[["categories"]][][item[["codes"]][] + 1]
        } else {
          meta_list[[col]] <- item[]
        }
      }, error = function(e) {})
    }
  }
  df <- data.frame(meta_list, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  if (file$exists("obs/_index")) rownames(df) <- file[["obs/_index"]][]
  return(df)
}

meta_data           <- read_obs(h5ad_file)
rownames(meta_data) <- Cells(ref_seurat)
ref_seurat          <- AddMetaData(ref_seurat, metadata = meta_data)

read_var <- function(h5_path) {
  file    <- H5File$new(h5_path, mode = "r")
  on.exit(file$close_all())
  var_grp  <- file[["var"]]
  meta_list <- list()
  for (col in names(var_grp)) {
    if (!grepl("^_", col)) {
      tryCatch({
        item <- var_grp[[col]]
        if ("categories" %in% names(item)) {
          meta_list[[col]] <- item[["categories"]][][item[["codes"]][] + 1]
        } else {
          meta_list[[col]] <- item[]
        }
      }, error = function(e) {})
    }
  }
  df <- data.frame(meta_list, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  if (file$exists("var/_index")) rownames(df) <- file[["var/_index"]][]
  return(df)
}

gene_meta    <- read_var(h5ad_file)
current_ids  <- rownames(ref_seurat)
if (any(grepl("^ENSG", head(current_ids)))) {
  target_col <- ifelse("feature_name" %in% colnames(gene_meta),
                       "feature_name", "gene_name")
  new_names  <- gene_meta[current_ids, target_col]
  new_names[is.na(new_names)] <- current_ids[is.na(new_names)]
  new_names  <- make.unique(new_names)
  rownames(ref_seurat) <- new_names
  cat("Gene IDs converted to Symbols.\n")
}
```

# 8. Deconvolution (KPMP Reference)

```{r deconv}
ref_seurat <- NormalizeData(ref_seurat)
ref_seurat <- FindVariableFeatures(ref_seurat, nfeatures = 3000)
ref_seurat <- ScaleData(ref_seurat, features = VariableFeatures(ref_seurat))
ref_seurat <- RunPCA(ref_seurat, verbose = FALSE)

susz <- FindVariableFeatures(susz, nfeatures = 2000)
susz <- ScaleData(susz)
susz <- RunPCA(susz, verbose = FALSE)

anchors <- FindTransferAnchors(
  reference            = ref_seurat,
  query                = susz,
  normalization.method = "LogNormalize",
  reference.reduction  = "pca",
  dims                 = 1:30
)

predictions <- TransferData(
  anchorset        = anchors,
  refdata          = ref_seurat$subclass.l2,
  weight.reduction = susz[["pca"]],
  dims             = 1:30
)

susz$M2Mac_fraction <- predictions[[MAC_M2_SCORE_COL]]
cat("M2Mac_fraction summary:\n")
print(summary(susz$M2Mac_fraction))
```

# 9. Fibrosis Score

```{r fibrosis_score}
final_fib_genes_val <- intersect(FINAL_FIB_GENES_DISCOVERY, rownames(susz))
genes_missing_val   <- setdiff(FINAL_FIB_GENES_DISCOVERY, rownames(susz))

cat("Present:", length(final_fib_genes_val), "/",
    length(FINAL_FIB_GENES_DISCOVERY), "\n")
if (length(genes_missing_val) > 0)
  cat("Missing:", paste(genes_missing_val, collapse = ", "), "\n")

susz <- AddModuleScore(
  susz,
  features = list(final_fib_genes_val),
  name     = "Fibrosis_Score",
  assay    = "Spatial"
)
susz$Fibrosis_Score  <- susz$Fibrosis_Score1
susz$Fibrosis_Score1 <- NULL
```

# 10. GWR

```{r gwr}
all_coords_list <- list()
for (img in Images(susz)) {
  c_data         <- GetTissueCoordinates(susz, image = img)
  c_data$Barcode <- rownames(c_data)
  all_coords_list[[img]] <- c_data
}
all_coords <- do.call(rbind, all_coords_list)

cols  <- colnames(all_coords)
y_col <- grep("row|y", cols, ignore.case = TRUE, value = TRUE)[1]
x_col <- grep("col|x", cols, ignore.case = TRUE, value = TRUE)[1]
all_coords$final_x <- all_coords[[x_col]]
all_coords$final_y <- all_coords[[y_col]]

meta_df           <- susz@meta.data
meta_df$Barcode   <- rownames(meta_df)
meta_df$log10_UMI <- log10(meta_df$nCount_Spatial + 1)

gwr_data  <- merge(meta_df, all_coords, by = "Barcode")
gwr_input <- data.frame(
  Barcode    = gwr_data$Barcode,
  Sample     = as.character(gwr_data$orig.ident),
  x          = gwr_data$final_x,
  y          = gwr_data$final_y,
  Y_Fibrosis = gwr_data$Fibrosis_Score,
  X_M2       = gwr_data$M2Mac_fraction,
  Cov_logUMI = gwr_data$log10_UMI
) %>%
  na.omit() %>%
  filter(Sample %in% keep_samples)

cat("GWR input:", nrow(gwr_input), "spots\n")
cat("Spots per sample:\n")
print(table(gwr_input$Sample))

gwr_results_list <- list()
for (s in unique(gwr_input$Sample)) {
  sub_data <- subset(gwr_input, Sample == s)
  if (nrow(sub_data) < 50) {
    cat("Skip:", s, "(spots:", nrow(sub_data), ")\n"); next
  }
  cat("Processing:", s, "| Spots:", nrow(sub_data), "\n")
  sp_sub <- sub_data
  coordinates(sp_sub) <- ~x + y

  tryCatch({
    bw    <- bw.gwr(f_main, data = sp_sub,
                    approach = "AIC", kernel = "bisquare", adaptive = TRUE)
    model <- gwr.basic(f_main, data = sp_sub,
                       bw = bw, kernel = "bisquare", adaptive = TRUE)
    res   <- as.data.frame(model$SDF)
    raw_p <- 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(res$X_M2_TV)))
    adj_p <- p.adjust(raw_p, method = "BH")
    gwr_results_list[[s]] <- data.frame(
      Barcode  = sub_data$Barcode,
      Sample   = s,
      M2_Coeff = res$X_M2,
      M2_AdjP  = adj_p,
      M2_t_val = res$X_M2_TV
    )
    cat("  Done: bw =", bw, "\n")
  }, error = function(e) cat("Error:", s, e$message, "\n"))
}
cat("GWR complete:", length(gwr_results_list), "/",
    length(unique(gwr_input$Sample)), "samples\n")
```

# 11. GWR results -> Seurat metadata

```{r gwr_results}
final_results           <- do.call(rbind, gwr_results_list)
rownames(final_results) <- final_results$Barcode

matched_indices <- match(rownames(susz@meta.data), final_results$Barcode)
susz$M2_Coeff   <- final_results$M2_Coeff[matched_indices]
susz$M2_AdjP    <- final_results$M2_AdjP[matched_indices]
susz$M2_t_val   <- final_results$M2_t_val[matched_indices]

# count high-coupling spots
sig_summary <- susz@meta.data %>%
  filter(orig.ident %in% keep_samples) %>%
  group_by(orig.ident) %>%
  summarise(
    n_Analyzed       = sum(!is.na(M2_AdjP)),
    n_HighCoupling   = sum(M2_Coeff > GWR_COEF_THRESHOLD &
                           M2_AdjP  < GWR_FDR_THRESHOLD, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_Reference      = n_Analyzed - n_HighCoupling,
    Pct_HighCoupling = round(n_HighCoupling / n_Analyzed * 100, 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(Pct_HighCoupling))

cat("=== High-Coupling Spot Summary (DKD only) ===\n")
print(sig_summary)

# save to CSV
timestamp_gwr <- format(Sys.time(), "%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
write.csv(sig_summary,
          file.path(DIR_OUT, paste0("GWR_HighCouplingSummary_DKDonly_",
                                    timestamp_gwr, ".csv")),
          row.names = FALSE)

valid_samples <- sig_summary %>%
  filter(n_HighCoupling >= MIN_HIGHCOUPLING_SPOTS,
         n_Reference    >= MIN_REFERENCE_SPOTS) %>%
  pull(orig.ident)

cat("Valid samples for DEG (n =", length(valid_samples), "):\n")
print(valid_samples)

# Spot_Label (3 categories: High-coupling / Reference / NA)
susz$Spot_Label <- ifelse(
  !is.na(susz$M2_Coeff) & 
    susz$M2_Coeff > GWR_COEF_THRESHOLD &
    susz$M2_AdjP  < GWR_FDR_THRESHOLD,
  "High-coupling", "Reference"
)
susz$Spot_Label[is.na(susz$M2_Coeff)] <- "NA"
susz$Spot_Label <- factor(
  susz$Spot_Label,
  levels = c("High-coupling", "Reference", "NA")
)
```

# 12. Pseudo-bulk DEG (edgeR) — NA-safe Version

```{r deg}
# early exit if valid_samples is empty
if (length(valid_samples) == 0) {
  cat("\nWARNING: valid_samples is empty.\n")
  cat("Consider relaxing MIN_HIGHCOUPLING_SPOTS / MIN_REFERENCE_SPOTS,\n")
  cat("or skip DEG analysis and produce only the spatial plots.\n")
  knitr::knit_exit()
}

# restrict to GWR-evaluable spots (NA-safe)
target_barcodes <- colnames(susz)[
  susz$orig.ident %in% valid_samples &
  !is.na(susz$M2_Coeff) &
  !is.na(susz$M2_AdjP)
]

cat("Spots retained for DEG:", length(target_barcodes), "\n")
cat("Any NA in M2_Coeff?: ",
    any(is.na(susz$M2_Coeff[target_barcodes])), "\n")
cat("Any NA in M2_AdjP?:  ",
    any(is.na(susz$M2_AdjP[target_barcodes])), "\n")

# pseudo_group (built from target_barcodes only)
# not using AggregateExpression, but use "-" separators to match KPMP
coupling_labels <- ifelse(
  susz$M2_Coeff[target_barcodes] > GWR_COEF_THRESHOLD &
  susz$M2_AdjP[target_barcodes]  < GWR_FDR_THRESHOLD,
  "HighCoupling",
  "Reference"
)
pg_labels <- paste(
  susz$orig.ident[target_barcodes],
  coupling_labels,
  sep = "-"
)

# malformed check
if (any(grepl("-NA$", pg_labels))) {
  stop("pseudo_group contains *-NA; check the NA-exclusion step.")
}

cat("=== Coupling Label counts ===\n")
print(table(coupling_labels))

# build pseudobulk counts (manual sapply approach)
# Susztak analysis uses SCT counts (same as discovery)
counts_raw_sct <- GetAssayData(susz, assay = "SCT", layer = "counts")
counts_sub_sct <- counts_raw_sct[, target_barcodes]

groups <- sort(unique(pg_labels))
counts_matrix_sct <- sapply(groups, function(g) {
  bc <- target_barcodes[pg_labels == g]
  Matrix::rowSums(counts_sub_sct[, bc, drop = FALSE])
})

cat("Pseudo-bulk matrix:", nrow(counts_matrix_sct), "×",
    ncol(counts_matrix_sct), "\n")

cat("--- counts_matrix_sct columns ---\n")
print(colnames(counts_matrix_sct))

# check for unexpected columns
unexpected_cols <- colnames(counts_matrix_sct)[
  !grepl("-HighCoupling$", colnames(counts_matrix_sct)) &
  !grepl("-Reference$",    colnames(counts_matrix_sct))
]
if (length(unexpected_cols) > 0) {
  stop(
    paste("Unexpected column names in counts_matrix:",
          paste(unexpected_cols, collapse = ", "))
  )
}

# targets metadata
sample_names_pb <- colnames(counts_matrix_sct)
conditions <- ifelse(
  grepl("-HighCoupling$", sample_names_pb), "HighCoupling",
  ifelse(grepl("-Reference$", sample_names_pb), "Reference", NA)
)
if (any(is.na(conditions))) {
  stop("Condition contains NA; check the column-name format.")
}

ids <- sample_names_pb
ids <- sub("-HighCoupling$", "", ids)
ids <- sub("-Reference$",    "", ids)

targets <- data.frame(
  row.names = sample_names_pb,
  SampleID  = factor(ids),
  Condition = factor(conditions, levels = c("Reference", "HighCoupling"))
)

cat("--- targets ---\n")
print(targets)

cat("Condition counts:", table(targets$Condition), "\n")
cat("SampleID counts :", table(targets$SampleID), "\n")

# verify paired design
pair_tab <- table(targets$SampleID, targets$Condition)
cat("--- Pair table ---\n")
print(pair_tab)

if (any(rowSums(pair_tab > 0) < 2)) {
  stop("Some SampleIDs lack both HighCoupling and Reference conditions.")
}

# edgeR
keep_genes  <- rowSums(counts_matrix_sct >= 10) >= 2
counts_filt <- counts_matrix_sct[keep_genes, ]
cat("Genes after filtering:", nrow(counts_filt), "\n")

design <- model.matrix(~ SampleID + Condition, data = targets)
cat("--- design matrix colnames ---\n")
print(colnames(design))
cat("Degrees of freedom:", nrow(targets) - ncol(design), "\n")

y   <- DGEList(counts = counts_filt, group = targets$Condition)
y   <- calcNormFactors(y)
y   <- estimateDisp(y, design, robust = TRUE)
fit <- glmQLFit(y, design, robust = TRUE)
qlf <- glmQLFTest(fit, coef = ncol(design))

all_results <- topTags(qlf, n = Inf)$table
sig_genes   <- all_results[all_results$FDR <= 0.05, ]
sig_genes   <- sig_genes[order(sig_genes$logFC, decreasing = TRUE), ]

cat("\n=== DEG Results DKDonly (HighCoupling vs Reference) ===\n")
cat("Genes tested :", nrow(all_results), "\n")
cat("FDR < 0.05    :", nrow(sig_genes), "\n")
cat("Up (HighCoupling > Reference) :", sum(sig_genes$logFC > 0), "\n")
cat("Down (HighCoupling < Reference) :", sum(sig_genes$logFC < 0), "\n")
cat("\nTop 20 genes:\n")
print(head(all_results[order(all_results$PValue), ], 20))

timestamp <- format(Sys.time(), "%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
write.csv(
  all_results,
  file.path(DIR_OUT,
            paste0("EdgeR_HighCoupling_vs_Reference_all_DKDonly_",
                   timestamp, ".csv"))
)
write.csv(
  sig_genes,
  file.path(DIR_OUT,
            paste0("EdgeR_HighCoupling_vs_Reference_FDR0.05_DKDonly_",
                   timestamp, ".csv"))
)
cat("Saved to:", DIR_OUT, "\n")
```
